narrative: Senior AI Engineer at Adobe with six years of experience, coming from a product‑focused environment, brings solid depth in the core technologies the role demands. The strongest factor in his ranking is the verified skill depth he demonstrates across vector representations, deep‑learning models, and retrieval‑oriented techniques such as QLoRA and LoRA in PyTorch. His background aligns well with the JD’s focus on content matching and large‑scale search pipelines, and his broader technical toolkit adds useful breadth for cross‑functional product work. A caveat is his current location in Kolkata—outside the preferred Pune/Noida hub—and an unknown notice period, plus minor credibility flags in his profile.
